title: The Mystery of the Missing Titanic Gold

scenes.text: A fortune lies submerged in the depths after the Titanic tragedy.
The Titanic sank in the North Atlantic Ocean in 1912.
On its maiden voyage, the Titanic carried valuable cargo, including gold ingots worth millions.
The exact fate of the gold remains a mystery, with theories still explored.
scenes.label: UNSOLVED MYSTERY

scenes.text: Follow because some cases still need answers.

description: 📍 Atlantic Ocean - 1912. The Titanic bore a shipment of gold that disappeared when the ship sank, leaving its fate unknown. Follow for daily cold cases!
